name: Saffira, Dragon Queen of the Voiceless Voice
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>粛</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>声</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>賢</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>姫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>サフィラ
name_jp_tl: Saffira, Dragon Sage Princess of the Voiceless Voice
desc: You can discard this card; send 1 Ritual Spell from your Deck to the GY, then you can add 1 LIGHT Ritual Monster (Warrior or Dragon) from your Deck or GY to your hand. You can banish this card from your GY; Ritual Summon 1 LIGHT Ritual Monster (Warrior or Dragon) from your hand, by Tributing monsters from your hand or field whose total Levels equal or exceed the Level of the Ritual Monster. You can only use each effect of "Saffira, Dragon Queen of the Voiceless Voice" once per turn.

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
